summary: End-to-end testing of Deepak Bansal 3D portfolio (FastAPI + MongoDB + React + R3F). Backend: 7/7 pytest tests passed (health, profile shape, github repos w/ fallback support, contact POST/GET, validation 422). Frontend: hero, navigation smooth-scroll, about, skills 3D canvas, all 4 project cards, experience timeline, 3 awards, contact form submission (success + form-clear), HTML5 invalid email validation, and mobile menu toggle all verified. Integration verified: contact form submissions persist to MongoDB and appear in GET /api/contact.

issues: Frontend Hero displays '10K+' for end-users stat while /api/profile returns '10,000+'. Cosmetic only — both are valid representations and the spec explicitly expects '10K+' on the hero. No action required unless single source of truth is desired.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~327 lines — fine for now but PROFILE static dict (~110 lines) could be extracted to a data/profile.py module for cleanliness.
GitHub repos in-memory cache (_GH_CACHE) is process-local; OK for a portfolio but would need Redis if horizontally scaled.

/api/contact GET is unauthenticated and returns up to 100 messages (incl. submitter emails). For a public portfolio this leaks contact submissions — consider adding admin auth or limiting fields exposed (no action required if intentional).
PyObjectId / BaseDocument.from_mongo defined but unused (ContactMessageOut is constructed manually in list_contact). Minor dead code.
ContactMessageIn does not strip/normalize input before email validation — fine since EmailStr handles validation.
Frontend properly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (verified via successful form submit). data-testid coverage is comprehensive on all interactive/key elements — excellent testability.
seed_data_creation: Test contact messages (TEST_User_*, TEST_PW_*) inserted during testing into contact_messages collection. Safe to leave or clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py (pytest, 7 tests). Frontend uses data-testid throughout — selectors hero-*, nav-link-*, project-card-*, contact-form-*, contact-success/error, skills-3d-canvas, experience-timeline, award-item-N, nav-menu-toggle. /api/github/repos may return source=fallback in this sandbox (expected). 'networkidle' wait_until times out because of continuous WebGL animation — use 'domcontentloaded' + small wait instead.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. App is functioning end-to-end as specified.
